subject: Bump step-security/harden-runner from 2.19.3 to 2.19.4
commit_message:
Bump step-security/harden-runner from 2.19.3 to 2.19.4

## Release notes

Sourced from step-security/harden-runner's releases.

v2.19.4
What's Changed

Improvements for HTTPS Monitoring for the Enterprise tier of Harden Runner

Full Changelog: https://github.com/step-security/harden-runner/compare/v2.19.3...v2.19.4

## Commits

9af89fc Merge pull request #667 from step-security/update-agent-v1.8.6
485dce8 Update agent to v1.8.6
See full diff in compare view

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Change-Id: I576f0d9e9645b0b60c54c27a47f9cf9d62f6f05b
GitHub-PR: https://github.com/onap/ccsdk-distribution/pull/9
GitHub-Hash: a8f52ceade2c02aa
Signed-off-by: onap.gh2gerrit <releng+onap-gh2gerrit@linuxfoundation.org>
